title: Packaging specifier membership handles prereleases and compatible releases
prompt: Fix allows so it matches packaging-style PEP 440 specifier behavior, especially default prerelease exclusion and the upper-bound rules for compatible release operators like ~=1.4 and ~=1.4.5.
golden_patch_description: Match packaging specifier membership for prerelease exclusion, exact matching, and compatible-release upper-bound behavior.
instance_notes: Compact PEP 440 specifier-membership slice derived from packaging specifier tests.
